'''Werncin 3''' was a [[Slavery/Legends|slaving]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Werncin system/Legends|Werncin system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]], on the [[Listehol Run/Legends|Listehol Run]].

{{Planet-stub}}
